findings.summary: _PRIMITIVE_TIER omits 13 of 22 change primitives (delete/replace/move/decompose/generate/deprecate/merge/inline/abstract/test/secure/gate/document) -> silent None -> no changeset -> no release. Docstring claims a full 22-primitive audit; false.
findings.suggested_fix: Decide tier policy for the 13 unmapped primitives; complete the map + docstring + add a pinning test.

findings.summary: Raw scalar fields (change_id/primitive/tier) allow newline injection -> forged extra YAML line (e.g. tier: major). Python reader safe (last-wins); bash GHA first-match reader would forge a bump.
findings.suggested_fix: Reject newlines (and ideally ':') in scalar fields at _dump_changeset.

findings.summary: Block-scalar/quote/comment grammar the bash re-implementer must match lives only in Python; README promises bash parsing but doesn't specify the rules.
findings.suggested_fix: Add a 'rules for re-implementers' section (2-space indent unit; block ends at first non-indented line; internal blanks preserved; trailing blanks stripped; quote/comment handling).

findings.summary: README tier-table not conformance-tested; next_version undocumented ValueError; test_..._full_mapping misnamed; comment L46 overclaims group coverage; empty scalar -> '' not None; read_changeset_examples negative-filter branch untested.
